FACILITY   (CYCTM,1USALRL) Deuterons accelerated up to 11 MeV by  F0218001   13 
           electrost. tandem accelerator and to high energies by  F0218001   14 
           a cyclotron injecting negative 8-MeV deuterium ions    F0218001   15 
           into the electrost. accelerator.                       F0218001   16 
SAMPLE     The deuterium target was gaseous; the lithium,         F0218001   17 
           beryllium, and carbon targets were solid. Lithium and  F0218001   18 
           carbon were natural isotopic mixtures. All target      F0218001   19 
           materials had a chemical purity higher than 98%.       F0218001   20 
           50-, 70-, 75-, and 100- um beryllium targets were      F0218001   21 
           also used.                                             F0218001   22 
METHOD     (TOF,PSD)                                              F0218001   23 
DETECTOR   (SCIN) Liquid scintillator of 5*5 cm NE213.            F0218001   24 
ERR-ANALYS (ERR-SYS) Scale uncertainties, due largely to detector F0218001   25 
           efficiency uncertainties, are about 10%.               F0218001   26
